text_script.value: The council admits the hidden clause and renews the charter by consent. Scene marker page_secret_concordat binds schisming to duty, recording a unique causal trace for downstream branches.

text_script.value: No faction claims you. You live between laws, and the city forgets your name. Scene marker page_end_fallback binds city-church to law, recording a unique causal trace for downstream branches.
